name: Set weekly grocery reminders
instruction: I need a reminder every Sunday at 18:00 to order groceries. Ask me if I want any extra notes attached.
description: Simple recurring reminder, persona expects bullet confirmation before adding notes.
success_criteria: Executor asks whether a note should be added to the reminder.
Executor creates a weekly reminder on list_work for Sundays at 18:00.
Executor includes the user‑provided note verbatim in the reminder title.
world_assertions: A new reminder on list_work with cadence=weekly, day=Sunday, time=18:00 and title containing the confirmed note.

name: Schedule meditation reminders
instruction: I want to meditate each morning but only on weekdays. I'm flexible on the exact time, so ask me what works best.
description: Persona will reveal preferred time after a probing question, and rejects times before 07:00.
success_criteria: Executor asks the user for a preferred start time range.
Executor creates a weekday reminder on list_personal with the confirmed time.
Executor respects the constraint that the time must be 07:00 or later.
world_assertions: A new reminder on list_personal with cadence=weekly, days=Mon‑Fri, time≥07:00 and title mentioning 'meditate'.

name: Bike maintenance reminder
instruction: My bike needs a check‑up every 3 months. I don't remember the last date, so ask me to pick a start month.
description: Persona will give a start month but will push back if the assistant proposes a date in the past.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the month to start the quarterly cycle.
Executor creates a quarterly reminder on list_work beginning in the user‑chosen month.
Executor confirms the next occurrence date before creating the reminder.
world_assertions: A new reminder on list_work with cadence=quarterly, start month matching user input, and title containing 'bike'.

name: Family dinner alert
instruction: Every Friday at 19:00 I need a reminder to start cooking dinner for the family. Ask me if I want a prep note added.
description: Persona may mention that the kids arrive at 19:30, so the reminder should be before that.
success_criteria: Executor asks whether a prep note should be attached.
Executor creates a weekly Friday reminder at 19:00 on list_personal.
Executor confirms that the reminder occurs before the kids' arrival time.
world_assertions: A new reminder on list_personal with day=Friday, time=19:00, cadence=weekly and title referencing 'dinner' and any user‑provided note.

name: Water intake reminders
instruction: I want to be reminded to drink water every 2 hours between 09:00 and 21:00. Ask me for the exact interval if needed.
description: Persona will provide a preferred start time but insists on exactly two‑hour spacing.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the first reminder time within the window.
Executor creates multiple daily reminders on list_work spaced exactly two hours apart.
Executor ensures the last reminder does not exceed 21:00.
world_assertions: Four new reminders on list_work for the same day with times 09:00, 11:00, 13:00, 15:00, 17:00, 19:00, 21:00 (as appropriate) and title containing 'water'.

name: Pet vet appointment reminder
instruction: My cat's vet visit is on 2026-05-20 at 10:30. I need a reminder the day before and an hour before. Ask me if I want any additional notes.
description: Persona expects two separate reminders and may reject a reminder scheduled after the appointment.
success_criteria: Executor asks whether a note should be added to each reminder.
Executor creates a reminder on 2026-05-19 at a user‑chosen time before 10:30.
Executor creates a second reminder on 2026-05-20 at 09:30.
Executor confirms both times with the user before creation.
world_assertions: Two new reminders on list_personal: one on 2026-05-19 (time confirmed) and one on 2026-05-20 at 09:30, both with titles mentioning 'cat' or 'vet'.

name: Project deadline check‑in
instruction: I have a project due on 2026-06-01. I want a reminder three days prior and a final check‑in on the day. Ask me for preferred times.
description: Persona will insist on a 09:00 time for the three‑day reminder and a 15:00 time for the same‑day reminder.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the preferred times for each reminder.
Executor creates a reminder on 2026-05-29 at 09:00 on list_work.
Executor creates a reminder on 2026-06-01 at 15:00 on list_work.
Executor obtains explicit confirmation before creating each reminder.
world_assertions: Two new reminders on list_work: 2026-05-29 09:00 and 2026-06-01 15:00 with titles referencing 'project deadline'.

name: Daily journal prompt
instruction: I want a gentle reminder each evening to write in my journal. I prefer a calm phrasing, but I haven't decided on a specific time yet.
description: Persona may reveal a preference for after‑dinner, around 20:00, and will reject times before 18:00.
success_criteria: Executor asks for a preferred time window.
Executor creates a daily reminder on list_inbox at a time the user confirms (likely 20:00).
Executor uses a calming tone in the reminder title as requested.
world_assertions: A new daily reminder on list_inbox with time ≥18:00, title containing 'journal' and a calm phrasing.

name: Weekend gardening alert
instruction: Remind me to water the garden every Saturday morning. I'm usually up by 08:30, but let me know if you need more detail.
description: Persona may push back on any reminder earlier than 08:00.
success_criteria: Executor asks whether a specific time before 09:00 is acceptable.
Executor creates a weekly Saturday reminder at 08:30 on list_personal.
Executor confirms the time with the user before creation.
world_assertions: A new weekly reminder on list_personal for Saturdays at 08:30 with title mentioning 'garden' or 'water'.

name: Monthly budget review reminder
instruction: I need a reminder on the last day of each month to review my budget. Ask me for a preferred time slot and whether I want a summary attached.
description: Persona will provide a time between 16:00‑18:00 and will reject any reminder after 20:00.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the preferred time on the last day of the month.
Executor creates a monthly reminder on list_work for the last day at the confirmed time.
Executor asks if a budget summary note should be attached and includes it if given.
world_assertions: A new monthly reminder on list_work with day=last, time within 16:00‑18:00, and title containing 'budget review' plus any user note.

name: Medication refill notice
instruction: I need a reminder two weeks before my blood pressure medication runs out. I don't know the exact depletion date, so ask me to estimate it.
description: Persona will give an approximate date; assistant must calculate the reminder date and confirm.
success_criteria: Executor asks the user to estimate the depletion date.
Executor calculates a reminder two weeks prior to the estimated date.
Executor confirms the calculated reminder date with the user before creating it.
world_assertions: A new reminder on list_personal with a date exactly 14 days before the user‑estimated depletion date and title mentioning 'blood pressure'.

name: Yearly tax deadline reminder
instruction: Create a reminder for the tax filing deadline on 2026-04-15 and a follow‑up one week before. Ask me for the preferred time of day.
description: Persona insists on a morning time (08:00‑09:00) for both reminders and will reject any afternoon slot.
success_criteria: Executor asks for a morning time slot.
Executor creates a reminder on 2026-04-08 at the confirmed time.
Executor creates a reminder on 2026-04-15 at the same confirmed time.
Executor obtains explicit user confirmation before each creation.
world_assertions: Two new reminders on list_work: 2026-04-08 and 2026-04-15 with time between 08:00‑09:00 and titles referencing 'tax'.

name: Weekly language practice reminder
instruction: I want to practice Spanish for 30 minutes every Tuesday and Thursday. Ask me when I usually have free time on those days.
description: Persona will give a time window (e.g., 19:00‑20:00) and will push back if the assistant proposes a slot before 18:00.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the preferred time window on Tuesdays and Thursdays.
Executor creates two weekly reminders at the user‑confirmed times.
Executor confirms each reminder's day, time, and duration before creation.
world_assertions: Two new weekly reminders on list_personal: Tuesday and Thursday at the confirmed times, each with duration 30 min and title mentioning 'Spanish'.

name: Nurse shift change alert
instruction: My sister works night shifts and changes at 07:00. I need a reminder to call her each day at that time. Ask me if I want a custom message.
description: Persona may mention that she prefers the reminder at 06:45 to give a buffer.
success_criteria: Executor asks whether a custom message should be attached.
Executor creates a daily reminder at 06:45 (or the user‑confirmed time) on list_inbox.
Executor confirms the time and message with the user before creation.
world_assertions: A new daily reminder on list_inbox at the confirmed time with title containing 'call sister' or similar and any custom message.

name: Annual vacation planning reminder
instruction: Remind me on March 1st to finalize my vacation plans for the summer. I want a concise title and no extra notes.
description: Persona expects a bullet‑point style confirmation before the reminder is added.
success_criteria: Executor confirms the date (2026-03-01) and that no extra note is needed.
Executor creates a one‑time reminder on list_work for March 1st.
Executor presents the reminder title in bullet‑point format before creation.
world_assertions: A new reminder on list_work for 2026-03-01 with title 'vacation planning' (or close synonym) and no additional description.

name: Monthly car service reminder
instruction: I need a reminder on the first Monday of each month to check my car's oil level. Ask me for a preferred time and whether I want a checklist attached.
description: Persona will provide 09:15 as the preferred time and will want a short checklist.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the preferred time and checklist preference.
Executor creates a monthly reminder on list_work for the first Monday at 09:15.
Executor includes a brief checklist in the reminder description if the user wants it.
world_assertions: A new monthly reminder on list_work on the first Monday at 09:15 with title referencing 'car oil' and, if requested, a checklist in the description.

name: Daily stretching prompt
instruction: I want a gentle reminder to stretch every day after I finish work. I finish around 18:00, but please ask me for the exact time.
description: Persona prefers a calming tone and will reject times before 17:30.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the exact post‑work time.
Executor creates a daily reminder at the confirmed time on list_inbox.
Executor uses a calm phrasing in the reminder title as requested.
world_assertions: A new daily reminder on list_inbox with time ≥17:30, title containing 'stretch' and a gentle tone.

name: Weekly choir rehearsal reminder
instruction: Remind me every Thursday at 20:00 for choir practice. Ask me if I want a reminder to bring my music folder.
description: Persona may say they sometimes start at 20:30, so the assistant should confirm the exact start time.
success_criteria: Executor asks whether the start time is exactly 20:00 or a later offset.
Executor creates a weekly Thursday reminder at the user‑confirmed time.
Executor asks if a note about the music folder should be added and includes it if yes.
world_assertions: A new weekly reminder on list_personal for Thursday at the confirmed time with title mentioning 'choir' and optional note about the music folder.

name: Quarterly tax estimate reminder
instruction: I need a reminder on the 15th of each quarter to estimate my taxes. Ask me for a preferred time and whether I want a template attached.
description: Persona will give 10:00 as the preferred time and will expect a concise template.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the preferred time on the 15th.
Executor creates quarterly reminders on list_work for Jan 15, Apr 15, Jul 15, Oct 15 at 10:00.
Executor attaches a short tax‑estimate template if the user requests it.
world_assertions: Four new quarterly reminders on list_work with dates 2026‑01‑15, 2026‑04‑15, 2026‑07‑15, 2026‑10‑15 at 10:00 and titles referencing 'tax estimate' plus any attached template.

name: Monthly gym membership check
instruction: Remind me on the 5th of each month to verify my gym membership payment. Ask me if I want to include the gym's contact info.
description: Persona will provide the gym's phone number if asked, and prefers a morning reminder.
success_criteria: Executor asks whether to include the gym contact in the reminder.
Executor creates a monthly reminder on the 5th at a morning time (e.g., 09:00) on list_personal.
Executor includes the provided contact info in the reminder description if the user supplies it.
world_assertions: A new monthly reminder on list_personal for day=5, time≈09:00, title containing 'gym membership' and, if given, the gym's contact info in the description.

name: Weekly family call reminder
instruction: Set a reminder every Sunday at 20:00 to call my parents. Ask me if I want a short agenda attached.
description: Persona may say they sometimes prefer 20:30, so the assistant should confirm the exact time.

Executor creates a weekly Sunday reminder at the confirmed time on list_inbox.
Executor asks if an agenda should be attached and includes it if provided.
world_assertions: A new weekly reminder on list_inbox for Sunday at the confirmed time with title mentioning 'call parents' and optional agenda.

name: Daily water meditation reminder
instruction: I want a short reminder at 07:30 each morning to drink water and do a breathing exercise. Ask me if I need any extra wording.
description: Persona expects a concise title and will reject any reminder after 08:00.

Executor creates a daily reminder at 07:30 on list_work.
Executor uses a concise title as requested, adding extra wording only if the user approves.

name: Monthly credit card statement reminder
instruction: Remind me on the 3rd of each month to review my credit card statement. I need a confirmation of the time before adding it.
description: Persona prefers a time between 08:00‑09:00 and will reject any afternoon slot.
success_criteria: Executor asks for the preferred time within the morning window.
Executor creates a monthly reminder on the 3rd at the confirmed time on list_work.
Executor obtains explicit confirmation before creating the reminder.
world_assertions: A new monthly reminder on list_work for day=3, time between 08:00‑09:00, title mentioning 'credit card statement'.

name: Weekly plant watering reminder
instruction: I need a reminder every Wednesday at 17:00 to water my indoor plants. No extra notes needed.
description: Persona wants bullet‑point confirmation before creation.
success_criteria: Executor confirms the day, time, and lack of extra notes in bullet format.
Executor creates a weekly Wednesday reminder at 17:00 on list_personal.
Executor does not add any description beyond the title.

name: Daily workout log reminder
instruction: Create a daily reminder at the end of my workday (around 18:30) to log my workout. Ask me for the exact time and whether I want a link to my spreadsheet attached.
description: Persona prefers the reminder at 18:30 but will accept a time within ±15 minutes.

name: Monthly book club meeting reminder

description: Persona will provide a list of titles if asked, and expects confirmation of the date before creation.
success_criteria: Executor confirms the second Saturday of each month as the recurring date.
Executor asks whether a list of book titles should be attached.
Executor creates a monthly reminder at 14:00 on list_personal with the optional list included.
world_assertions: A new monthly reminder on list_personal for the second Saturday at 14:00 with title mentioning 'book club' and, if supplied, a list of titles in the description.

name: Weekly budget review reminder
instruction: I want a gentle reminder every Sunday evening to review my weekly spending. Ask me for a preferred time after dinner.
description: Persona will suggest 20:30 but will reject any reminder before 19:00.

Executor creates a weekly Sunday reminder at the confirmed time on list_inbox.
Executor uses a calm phrasing in the title as requested.

name: Quarterly health check reminder

Executor creates three quarterly reminders on list_personal for the chosen months at a standard time (e.g., 10:00).

name: Daily stand‑up preparation reminder

name: Monthly pet food order reminder

name: Weekly language exchange reminder

name: Daily meditation reflection reminder
instruction: I want a gentle reminder each evening after my meditation (around 21:00) to jot down reflections. Ask me if I want a short prompt attached.

description: Persona will provide a time of 09:00 and will want the keys attached if they exist.
